title: polypodium billardierei subvar. nanum
intro: Polypodium billardierei subvar. nanum, also known as the Dwarf Polypody, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to aid in the treatment of various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, Polypodium billardierei subvar. nanum is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional remedies to treat conditions such as colds, respiratory issues, and skin infections.
